name: Turnip or Carrot Custard
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups grated raw turnip, or mashed cooked carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs slightly.
2. Add the grated raw turnip (or mashed cooked carrots) and other ingredients to the beaten eggs.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
4. Place the baking dish on a rack in a pan of hot water.
5. Bake in a moderate oven for about 1 hour, or until the custard is set in the center.
6. Serve immediately.
Carrots may be used in the same way as the turnips.
